title: Candesartan Cilexetil Disrupts Membrane Homeostasis of Methicillin-Resistant Staphylococcus aureus and Potentiates the Anti-bacterial Activity of Gentamicin and  Polymyxin B
author: Nagendran, Tharmalingam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Transcriptome raw files: RNA sequencing was performed on MRSA-MW2 bacteria treated with Candesartan Cilexetil (CC), using two biological replicates.
steps_raw: Transcriptome raw files: RNA sequencing was performed on MRSA-MW2 bacteria treated with Candesartan Cilexetil (CC), using two biological replicates.
